---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Zoey"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: html_document
---
```{r housekeeping}
# Package names
packages <- c("tidyverse","ggsci", "janitor", "readxl", "egor", "sna","dplyr","stats","purrr","igraph","networktools","tidygraph")
 

# Install packages not yet installed
installed_packages <- packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())
if (any(installed_packages == FALSE)) {
  install.packages(packages[!installed_packages])
}

# Packages loading
invisible(lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
```

## R Markdown

```{r }
library(egoLangBetweenness)
library(igraph)

```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
# Set folder path here:
path <- 'C:/Users/Zoey/OneDrive - UC San Diego/Desktop/dataset project'

```

### network questionnaire preparation
```{r}

# ead all columns as character to avoid type-mismatch errors when combining files
read_csv_char <- function(path) {
  read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, colClasses = "character")
}

alter_dir <- file.path(path, "tcc_pns", "tcc_pns_alter")
ego_dir   <- file.path(path, "tcc_pns", "tcc_pns_ego")
tie_dir   <- file.path(path, "tcc_pns", "tcc_pns_edgelist_tie")

alterData <- list.files(alter_dir, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "_attributeList_People.csv") |> 
  lapply(read_csv_char) |> 
  dplyr::bind_rows()

egoID <- list.files(ego_dir, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "_ego.csv") |> 
  lapply(read_csv_char) |> 
  dplyr::bind_rows() 


edgelist <- list.files(tie_dir, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "_edgeList_tie.csv") |> 
  lapply(read_csv_char) |> 
  dplyr::bind_rows() 


exclusion <- c("melrio91", "iveote39", "daimoy82", "gredel26")

egoID_clean <- egoID|>
  dplyr::mutate(
    participant = tolower(participant),
    participant = dplyr::recode(
      participant,
      "cartrm72" = "cartre72",
      "dylber39" = "iveote39",
      "ellpac82" = "ellpac84",
      "sofgon22" = "sofgon23",
      "lernie04" = "lernie 04",
      "gersua38"   = "gersua",
      "sustir80" = "susitr80",
      "xiawuw10" = "xiawu10"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(!participant %in% exclusion)


alterData_linked <- alterData |> 
  dplyr::semi_join(
    egoID_clean |>  dplyr::select(networkCanvasEgoUUID, networkCanvasCaseID, participant),
    by = "networkCanvasEgoUUID"
  )|>  
  dplyr::select(-c("drag_screenSpaceX", "drag_screenSpaceY"))

edgelist_clean <- edgelist |> 
  dplyr::semi_join(
    egoID_clean |>  dplyr::select(networkCanvasEgoUUID),
    by = "networkCanvasEgoUUID"
  )


# the cleaned data: egoID_clean, alterData_linked,edgelist_clean

```


```{r data alter language use, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
classifyLanguageUseCategory <- function(df,
                                       prefix = "^ego_alter_language_",
                                       spanish_col = "ego_alter_language_Spanish",
                                       english_col = "ego_alter_language_English",
                                       none_label = "None/Unknown") {

  # 1) Find all language columns
  allLanguages <- grep(prefix, names(df), value = TRUE)

  # 2) Safety checks
  needed <- c(spanish_col, english_col)
  missing_needed <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_needed) > 0) {
    stop("Missing required columns: ", paste(missing_needed, collapse = ", "))
  }

  # 3) Coerce language columns to logical robustly
  #    Handles TRUE/FALSE, "true"/"false", 1/0, NA
  to_logical <- function(x) {
    if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
    if (is.numeric(x)) return(x == 1)
    if (is.character(x)) return(tolower(x) %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y"))
    as.logical(x)
  }

  lang_df <- df[, allLanguages, drop = FALSE]
  lang_df[] <- lapply(lang_df, to_logical)

  # Treat NA as FALSE for categorization
  lang_df[is.na(lang_df)] <- FALSE

  # 4) Define "other" columns: everything except Spanish/English
  otherLanguages <- setdiff(allLanguages, c(spanish_col, english_col))

  # 5) Row-wise flags (vectorized)
  speaksSpanish <- lang_df[[spanish_col]]
  speaksEnglish <- lang_df[[english_col]]
  speaksOther   <- if (length(otherLanguages) == 0) {
    rep(FALSE, nrow(df))
  } else {
    rowSums(lang_df[, otherLanguages, drop = FALSE]) > 0
  }

  # 6) Category
  category <- dplyr::case_when(
    speaksSpanish & speaksEnglish & speaksOther ~ "Spanish/English/Other",
    speaksSpanish & speaksEnglish               ~ "Spanish/English",
    speaksSpanish & speaksOther                 ~ "Spanish/Other",
    speaksEnglish & speaksOther                 ~ "English/Other",
    speaksSpanish                               ~ "Spanish",
    speaksEnglish                               ~ "English",
    speaksOther                                 ~ "Other",
    TRUE                                        ~ none_label
  )

  return(category)
}

alterData_linked$languageUsedCategory <- classifyLanguageUseCategory(alterData_linked)
janitor::tabyl(alterData_linked$languageUsedCategory)

```

```{r}


alterData_linked <- alterData_linked %>%
  left_join(
    egoID_clean %>%
      select(networkCanvasEgoUUID, participant),
    by = "networkCanvasEgoUUID"
  )

```

```{r}
library(egoLangBetweenness)

betweenness_df <- ego_language_betweenness_dataset(
  ego_df = egoID_clean,
  alter_df = alterData_linked,
  edge_df = edgelist_clean
)



```
